hero.title: Trace/Inhabit · SKILL
hero.subtitle: Memory · Trace / Inhabit centers on behavior logic, role capability, and knowledge structure, exploring a longer-lasting form of digital existence, so existence no longer stays only in memory.

intro.title: Trace / Inhabit
traceBullets: Extract role persona from novels, scripts, and animation materials
Analyze language style, personality traits, and behavior patterns
inhabitBullets: Load SoulPod and converse in character identity
Modes: Replica Mode / Companion Mode / Story Mode
Capabilities: role-scene dialogue, role image generation, role voice generation
